name: @aily-project/lib-adafruit-mqtt
author: Adafruit
description: 使用Adafruit MQTT库连接服务器并发布订阅消息

description_en: Connect to MQTT brokers and publish or subscribe with the Adafruit MQTT library
description_zh_hk: 使用Adafruit MQTT庫連接伺服器並發佈訂閱訊息

description_ko: Adafruit MQTT 라이브러리로 MQTT 브로커에 연결하고 메시지를 발행 및 구독합니다

description_pt: Conecte-se a brokers MQTT e publique ou assine mensagens com a biblioteca Adafruit MQTT
